name: biasmarket
description: A store builder for fandom sellers who already sell but struggle with messy, manual workflows, organize orders, manage reservations, and keep the human touch.
author: Bobadilla Technologie

scripts.admin:create:prod: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec api pnpm --filter api run admin:create
scripts.admin:promote:prod: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml exec api pnpm --filter api run admin:promote
scripts.admin:create:dev: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm --filter api run admin:create
scripts.admin:promote:dev: docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml exec api pnpm --filter api run admin:promote
